title: panicum cayennense var. divaricatum
intro: Panicum cayennense var. divaricatum, also known as Cayenne River Panic Grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Paniceae subfamily. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Panicum cayennense var. divaricatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in herbal remedies.
